judge_reason: Description B quotes specific typed text ('CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS', incident details, 'COPY' stamp) that Description A does not mention, indicating a fundamental disagreement on the visual content of the document.
original_image_tags: A black-and-white photocopy of a typed form. A large "CONFIDENTIAL" stamp is at the top center and a second identical stamp is at the bottom right. There are punch holes on the left margin. A handwritten "8" is in the bottom right corner.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned black-and-white document page titled “CONFIDENTIAL” and “CHECK-LIST – UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS,” showing a typed incident form with numbered entries 1–26; “Incident # 3” appears at upper right, and the page is punched with binder holes along the left edge.*
